ops.text: E7 FINAL VERDICT (2026-07-10, v2; verdict.md in lab results/E7): MOOT — stage 3 fires 0-2/100 across all retrieval configs (none/raw/MMR, k 0-16, ±draft), so exemplar choice cannot register. Weak directional: draft cells fire marginally more (1-2/100) than no-draft (0-1/100). Rerun only after stage-3 becomes rewrite-only; retrieval machinery itself validated (voyage-4-large + MMR, sub-ms at 3.2k).
